text_raw: You've got the gall to step foot on my turf.
text_clean: You've got the gall to step foot on my turf.

text_raw: Don't even imagine you'll leave here alive!
text_clean: Don't even imagine you'll leave here alive!

text_raw: It's been far too long since I've had proper sport!
text_clean: It's been far too long since I've had proper sport!

text_raw: I wonder if your corpse will be worth looting.
text_clean: I wonder if your corpse will be worth looting.

text_raw: Don't tell me you're another minion of Grace's.
text_clean: Don't tell me you're another minion of Grace's.

text_raw: Surely you're not foolish enough to think you can beat me.
text_clean: Surely you're not foolish enough to think you can beat me.

text_raw: Worthless things deserve not even a shred of my time.
text_clean: Worthless things deserve not even a shred of my time.

text_raw: All that noise, yet you crawl away like a trampled rat.
